title: The Sun (OneShot)
description: This resource pack adds Lightbulb and Niko's Hat from the game OneShot
body:
**ENG**
- P.S.: For the best visual experience, make sure to download and use [NoPumpkinOverlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nopumpkinoverlay).

- Enhance your gameplay with these nostalgic accessories!

**RUS**
- Для лучшего визуального эффекта рекомендуется загрузить и использовать [NoPumpkinOverlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nopumpkinoverlay).

- Сделайте вашу игру еще более атмосферной с этими ностальгическими аксессуарами!


It DEFINITELY works on **Optifine**, **_if_** it works on **EMF** for you too, then great!



If it's not OptiFineHD but the CIT mod, then the check:
- **Recommended version: 1.17.1**
- On version 1.20.1, Strange Journal breaks and the book doesn't change.
- On version 1.18.2, it gives an error when loading resource packs (I'm surprised myself).



```
renames(rename on anvil; for accuracy, it is advisable to copy from here. And if you add it to the server, then write renaming somewhere):

- Sea Lantern = The Sun;
- Carved Pampkin = Hat;
- Pumpkin pie = Pancakes;

- Book = Strange journal;
- Feather = Gold feather;
- Heart of the sea = Amber;
- Wheet seeds = Seed.
```
